title: Kuro’s Crew Clashes With the Straw Hats
description: On pages 18–21, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Nevermind! They already got up the slope...!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: TH... that kid. He actually dares to challenge Captain Kuro....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Before we fight, I want to ask you one Ques- lion...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You're a stranger here, why are you getting so involved with this village?!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
